name: Countdown
description: Counts down to a date and time. Great for launches and events.

name: Before / after
description: An image comparison slider with a draggable divider.

name: Theme toggle
description: A light / dark switch your visitors can click. Remembers their choice and stays in sync with the site.

name: CAI score card
description: The Codebase Assurance Index score card: band chip, band-inked score, the worst→best band ladder with a “you are here” marker, trend sparkline, lens bars and detail rows. Fetches a REAL published card from the kennel corpus when an API base is set (the repo named by owner/name, else the curated hero — highest-quality published repo); falls back to the labelled sample.

props.name: api-base
props.label: Live API base URL (empty = show the sample)

props.name: owner
props.label: Owner — pick a real published repo (with name)

props.name: name
props.label: Repo name — pick a real published repo (with owner)

props.name: card
props.label: Sample-card fallback (JSON — name, owner, score, series, arcFirst, arcBest, lenses, rows)

props.name: seal-text
props.label: Seal badge text (e.g. ✓ Signed by Watchdog)

props.name: href
props.label: Link the whole card to a URL

name: CAI score-card gallery
description: A responsive grid of CAI score cards — the public-record gallery of real published surveys (quiet-peer cards, not the accent hero artifact). Fetches the live corpus when an API base is set (newest-published first, then best score, capped at count); falls back to the labelled sample cards.

props.name: api-base
props.label: Live API base URL (empty = show the sample)

props.name: cards
props.label: Sample-cards fallback (JSON array of card objects)

name: CAI band scale
description: The canonical CAI presentation scale: five bands worst→best, cutlines 25/50/70/90, the display words, and an optional Score pin. Pins at a REAL published repo's live headline score when an API base is set (the repo named by owner/name, else the curated hero); falls back to the seeded score.

props.name: api-base
props.label: Live API base URL (empty = use the seeded score)

props.name: owner
props.label: Owner — pin at a real published repo (with name)

props.name: name
props.label: Repo name — pin at a real published repo (with owner)

name: CAI composition bar
description: A pure-SVG proportion bar for the brilliant / fine / slop code-composition split, coloured with the CAI band vocabulary. Builds the segments from a REAL published repo's measured brilliant%/slop% when an API base is set (the repo named by owner/name, else the curated hero); falls back to the seeded segments.

props.name: api-base
props.label: Live API base URL (empty = show the sample)

props.name: owner
props.label: Owner — use a real published repo (with name)

props.name: name
props.label: Repo name — use a real published repo (with owner)

props.name: segments
props.label: Sample segments fallback (JSON array of {label, pct, band})

name: CAI evidence flow
description: A left→right node strip with arrow connectors and an optional dashed loop-back path — the produce → hold → consume / measure → fix → prove diagram. Nodes come from a JSON array of { title, body, tone }.

props.name: loop-label
props.label: Loop-back label (draws a dashed return path when set)

name: CAI C4 architecture heat-map
description: The C4 architecture heat-map — bounded contexts and how they talk, coloured by health — the same map watchdog.canine.dev renders in the app's C4 wheel. Live only: fetches the public C4 corpus when an API base is set (the repo named by owner/name, else the densest curated map) and renders its real C4 heat SVG; shows nothing without a live source.

props.name: api-base
props.label: Live API base URL (required — this widget is live-only)

props.name: owner
props.label: Owner — pick a real published repo (with name)

props.name: name
props.label: Repo name — pick a real published repo (with owner)

name: CAI findings a scanner can't produce
description: The deterministic architecture / domain-model / event findings located to file:line, from real published reports — with the honest “showing N of M” and a link to the full report. Fetches the public findings feed when an API base is set (the repo named by owner/name, else the top count); falls back to a small labelled sample.

props.name: api-base
props.label: Live API base URL (empty = show the sample)

props.name: owner
props.label: Owner — pick a real published repo (with name)

props.name: name
props.label: Repo name — pick a real published repo (with owner)

name: Contact form
description: A contact form with a topic selector (?topic= prefill), name / email / organisation / message fields and a spam honeypot. Static pages have no API, so it submits to a configurable endpoint, defaulting to a mailto: to the fallback email.

props.name: fallback-email
props.label: Fallback email (mailto target / shown on failure)

props.name: action
props.label: Form POST endpoint (optional — empty = mailto the fallback)
